parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Execute a prompt in non-interactive mode. The CLI runs the prompt and exits when done.

parameters.name: model [optional]
parameters.description: Set the LLM model to use. Default effort will be used (not currently configurable from CLI). Empty means use .copilot/settings.json

parameters.name: max-autopilot-continues [optional]
parameters.description: Set a maximum continuation limit to prevent runaway loops
parameters.help_text: Set a maximum continuation limit to prevent runaway loops. 0 means exit after first task is accomplished.

parameters.name: update-copilot
parameters.description: Update the Copilot CLI tool before use. Under heavy development, may break capsule.
parameters.help_text: Update the Copilot CLI tool before use. Under heavy development, may break capsule.
